feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Accelerator Hub
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Accelerator Hub Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP BAPI_PO_GETDETAIL already fully invoice
entry.content:
Hi All,

Let's say we query from BAPI_PO_GETDETAIL, update completed PO with fully invoice to non-sap.

However, after a few months, user update the PO with credit memo, then how I can know which PO Number currently updated for this credit memo?

Summarize my explanation:

1. user set fully invoiced PO No for 11121

2. Technical use BAPI_PO_GETDETAIL for PO no 11121 and save that to non-sap

3. then suddenly user change that PO 11121 (credit memo) <-- From here how i can trace this po no from BAPI ?

thank you

entry.title: Error while testing an API in CF Integration suite
entry.content:
Error is below with response 200

"Since your browser does not support JavaScript, you must press the Continue button "

Does any faced a similar issue

entry.title: Consume SAP API in non-SAP applications..
entry.content:
Dear all,

We have our own JS based portal bespoke solution (non-SAP) developed by us having HR related functionality. Is it possible to consume SAP APIs (listed in SAP Business API hub)? Or do we need services like CPI or BTP based middleware?

Without that if it is possible then what are the ways to do it? Any help available?

Regards,

Pd

entry.title: API for SAP R/3 ECC 6 with EHP 8 ?
entry.content:
Hey Guys,

l am looking for an API for creating quotations on SAP R/3 ECC 6 with EHP 8.

Can you lead me ?

BR

entry.title: How to query the labels of Gender field in Personal Information by Odata API
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We are facing an issue of querying the labels of Gender field in Personal Information by Odata API.

The value returned was only "M"/"F", but we need the value of labels based on user's language, such as "Male"/"Female" if the user's language is English_US.

According to the following KBA, we have recognized that Gender is a hard-coded picklist and Gender field in Personal Information need to be defined as a STRING field, which means we can't get the labels through navigation.

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2249519

If you have any information please share.

entry.title: How can I put empty in Request parameter in Business accelerator
entry.content:
Hi Community

I am testing Odata connection now. I am trying out below

- Material Stock - Read

- Get Method

- /A_MatlStkInAcctMod

in this request, Batch/Supplier/Customer/SD documents and... are required to fill in. But Stocks in my S4HC has no info related to these info. very simple stock.

in this case what values I can put in Parameter field?

Best Regards,

Daichi

entry.title: API details needed for posting payment advice through FPAV in FICA
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I find below API from SAP business hub for posting payment advice but these APIs are posting payment advice in FI module, not in FICA module.

API Reference | Payment Advice - Create | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

Overview | Payment Advice (A2X) | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

Can someone help us to conclude if we have the API or not.

Regards..

Ganga

entry.title: Labels of BAS in SAP BTP COCKPIT
entry.content:
Hi All,
In my BTP cockpit i subscribed to business application studio (BAS) and added the labels to it. Now, is there any possibilty to get the labels of this subscription through any SAP provided API's or services .

If anybody have any idea. Please share. It's Urgent.

Regards,
Shivasuprith

entry.title: Integration SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition - Outbound Delivery is not reflected in SAP CI
entry.content:
Hi team,

Our customer needs an integration between SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition and SAP CI (Cloud Integration). The requirement is that every time an Outbound Delivery is created or modified, the data is replicated to CI.

We have investigated the corresponding API in SAP Business Accelerator Hub and found the following:

Outbound Delivery - Notify (B2B): https://api.sap.com/api/CO_EDI_DELIVERY_REQUEST_OUT/overview

The scope item that our customer has active is the following: 3NR (Sales Scheduling Agreements)

The User and Communication System were created, in the same way the Communication Arrangement has been created based on the communication scenario SAP_COM_0444.


Outbound Delivery 80000025 is created:

Outbound message is monitored through the Fiori Message Dashboard application: No outbound Outbound Delivery messages created are seen

(Namespace = /LEEDI; Recipient Name = EDI_DELOUT_RECIPIENT)

The Endpoint is monitored in CPI and the messages are not seen either:

Do we need any additional configuration?

Is the API we are using the correct one?

Thanks for your help.

Regards.

J. Camilo

entry.title: Can not find Communication Scenario SAP_COM_0339 in system
entry.content:
Hello expert,

We can not find Communication Scenario SAP_COM_0339 when creating communication arrangement.

Overview | Change Record History | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

entry.title: Business Partner (A2X) : : Record is getting deleted and added again in S4HANA (on-prem) for PATCH
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

we could see a strange behavior in S4 system, while performing an update/PATCH operation on FAX , Phone & Mobile number of BP request (standard API: Business Partner (A2X)), looks like record is getting deleted and added again instead of direct update on existing record.

Could you please let me know what is the reason of this behavior and why it is only for FAX , Phone & Mobile number?

entry.title: Odata API External Scheduler Integration Problem
entry.content:
I can't using api GET ApplicationLogMessageSet in group External Scheduler Integration. Option $expand in api ApplicationLogHeaderSet return same error and status code(500).

Base URL is my url system tenant SAP S4/HANA Public Cloud. 

In Eclipse ADT tool. SAP Gateway Error log return this log error. 

Is error of SAP API or I do something wrong? Give me help.

Thanks a lot.

entry.title: How to use OAuth 2.0 authorization while using SAP S/4 Hana cloud API.
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I want to use SAP S/4 Hana Cloud APIs and have them called from a 3rd Party application / website etc.  So, I have set up the S4HC Communication Arrangements etc and found the APIs to use and just using POSTMAN I have used Basic authorization to just check if these are the ones needed. But there is a need to use OAuth 2.0 for better security.

I have read the blog Maintain Assignment of Document Info Record to Mai... - SAP Community

and although I can get an OAUTH2 Token via POSTMAN as described in that that blog it would NOT be practical if I wanted a 3rd Party application to call the APIs - as the Token access requires a scope approval popup from S4HC.

I have read the document https://help.sap.com/doc/6ce62b6bdda340ffbeae3f138c3cb71b/SHIP/en-US/Set_Up_Authentication_for_SAP_S... which lists all available ways to Authenticate to SAP S/4HANA Cloud. 

But I still do not know of the way that a 3rd Party application could call my APIs via OAUTH - that guide seems to be talking about SAP BTP but we don't have the API management part turned on - is there another way that just involves S4HC without all that mucking about with scope approval popups etc. ?

Can anybody give me some guides on how to do this more effectively.

By the way we only have a 2 tier SAP landscape with QAS and PROD (so no DEV 🙄) and we only have SAP BTP Integration Suite and do not have the API Management part of BTP (for financial reasons no doubt  🤑). 

Thanks

entry.title: Consuming OAuth API in S4HANA
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have done with an OAuth connection from SAP cloud platform to S4HANA, consuming an API in business accelerator hub.

I am wondering if I can consume the API by http client tool like postman by using OAuth as well.

Anyone knows about that?

Regards,

Eric

entry.title: Can One Domain Model be used without Master Data Integration Service?
entry.content:
Hello,

For replication of master data we are trying out another approach where in we call the remote service/API directly without any middleware, thus eliminating the use of Master Data Integration Service. In this scenario can we make use of the One Domain Model without MDI Service?

Kind regards,

Shreya

entry.title: Is grant type client credentials supported for S/4HANA API OAuth?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am using OAuth 2.0 to consume S/4HANA cloud API.

In some examples, the grant type is SAML2 bearer assertion, I am wondering if grant type client credential works as well. I've tried but ended up with an error message saying unknow client. Nor I see any document about this configuration. Anyone may help here?

Regards,
Eric

entry.title: CSRF Token for API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV via OAUTH
entry.content:
Hi

I am calling the API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV to POST attachments via OAUTH

The API for POST of attachments requires a CSRF Token but it seems I am not able to request it using OAUTH - only Basic Authentication will return it in the x-csrf-token response header.

Why can't I use OAUTH for both?

entry.title: How to obtain S4HC OAUTH2 Token
entry.content:
Hi

via POSTMAN I can obtain my OAUTH2.0 Token for my S4HC public cloud system using the "Wizard" Authorization tab - Configure New Token.  

But how can I do this without using the power of that button ?   that is - can I mimic the steps myself ? i.e. I want a 3rd party application to call our APIs and I want them to do it via OAUTH.

entry.title: API_SALES_ORDER retuning empty values for sales order items during POST operation
entry.content:
Hello Experts

We are using SAP standard API https://api.sap.com/api/OP_API_SALES_ORDER_SRV_0001/path/post_A_SalesOrder

for Sales order creation. While making POST call to create Sales order along with Sales order items the Sales order is getting created successfully along with items. However in the response Payload the items section is returned as blank and we expect the line items details that got created. Please let me know how to get the line items data as well in the response Payload during POST call.

Current response received for items:

    "to_Item" : {
      "results" : [

 

      ]

}

Regards,

Abdul Hakim

entry.title: n/a
